title: Vacation & 13th Salary Calculator
meta_title: Vacation & 13th Salary Calculator 2025 | CLT Brazil - CalcForgeTools
meta_description: Calculate your CLT vacation pay, constitutional 1/3 bonus, cash conversion of vacation days, and proportional 13th salary. Free instant simulation.

hero.title: Vacation & 13th Salary Calculator
hero.subtitle: Find out how much you receive in vacation pay and 13th salary. Simulate with or without selling days and see every component detailed.

formula: Vacation = (Salary ÷ 30 × Days) + 1/3 Constitutional Bonus + Cash Conversion
formula_explanation: Vacation pay is calculated based on the salary divided by 30, multiplied by the vacation days owed. On top of this, the constitutional 1/3 bonus is applied. Cash conversion allows converting up to 1/3 of vacation days to money (max 10 days). The proportional 13th salary is the salary divided by 12, multiplied by months worked.
example: With a R$ 3,500 salary and full 30-day vacation without selling days, you receive R$ 3,500 vacation + R$ 1,166.67 (1/3 bonus) = R$ 4,666.67. Plus proportional 13th for 12 months: R$ 3,500. Total: R$ 8,166.67.

faq.question: What is the cash conversion of vacation days?
faq.answer: It is the right to sell up to 1/3 of your vacation (max 10 of 30 days). You receive the value of those days plus the 1/3 constitutional bonus on them in cash, but work during those days instead of resting.

faq.question: When do I receive the 13th salary?
faq.answer: The 13th is paid in two installments: the first between February and November (by Nov 30), and the second by December 20. You can request the 1st installment together with your vacation.

faq.question: How is proportional vacation calculated?
faq.answer: It is calculated as (months worked ÷ 12) × 30 days. If you worked 6 months, you are entitled to 15 proportional vacation days + 1/3.
